meta.name: Restaurant & Dining
meta.description: A warm, elegant template for restaurants, cafes, and food businesses

tagline.label: Tagline
tagline.default: Farm to table, heart to plate

title.label: Page Title
title.default: Osteria Bella — Farm to table dining

hero_heading.label: Hero Heading
hero_heading.default: Where every meal tells a story

hero_subheading.label: Hero Subheading
hero_subheading.default: Seasonal ingredients sourced from local farms, prepared with love and served in a setting that feels like home.

dish1_desc.label: Dish 1 Description
dish1_desc.default: Arborio rice, black truffle, aged parmesan, fresh herbs

dish2_desc.label: Dish 2 Description
dish2_desc.default: Whole roasted sea bass, lemon, capers, cherry tomatoes

dish3_desc.label: Dish 3 Description
dish3_desc.default: Slow-braised short rib, hand-cut pasta, San Marzano tomato

story_text.label: Story Text
story_text.default: We believe great food starts long before it reaches the kitchen. Our relationships with local farmers, fishermen, and artisan producers are the foundation of everything we do. Every ingredient is chosen with intention, every dish crafted with care.

chef_bio.label: Chef Bio
chef_bio.default: Trained in Bologna and refined over 15 years in New York, Marco brings an Italian soul and a New York edge to every plate.

menu_intro.label: Menu Introduction
menu_intro.default: Our menu changes with the seasons. Everything below is available this week — we encourage you to ask your server about today's specials.

starter1_desc.label: Starter 1 Desc
starter1_desc.default: Fresh burrata, roasted heirloom tomatoes, basil oil, fleur de sel

starter2_desc.label: Starter 2 Desc
starter2_desc.default: Hand-sliced wagyu, truffle aioli, micro arugula, shaved pecorino

main1_desc.label: Main 1 Desc
main1_desc.default: 28-day dry-aged T-bone, Tuscan herbs, lemon, rosemary potatoes (for two)

main2_desc.label: Main 2 Desc
main2_desc.default: Whole roasted sea bass, lemon, capers, cherry tomatoes, seasonal greens

dessert1_desc.label: Dessert 1 Desc
dessert1_desc.default: House-made tiramisu, espresso-soaked savoiardi, mascarpone, cocoa

contact_subheading.label: Contact Subheading
contact_subheading.default: We'd love to have you. Walk-ins welcome, reservations recommended on weekends.

private_desc.label: Private Events Desc
private_desc.default: Host your next celebration, corporate dinner, or intimate gathering with us. Our private dining room seats up to 30 guests. Contact us to discuss a custom menu and experience.
